1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons intersecting Kristiansand geometry (reduced national layer)

3.description: get 1km grid cells intersecting Kristiansand geometry (reduced national grid)

4.description: find grid cells that intersect 200-year storm-flood polygons

5.description: count distinct grid cell ids intersecting storm-flood areas

1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: select 200-year storm-flood polygons filtered by municipality bbox

3.description: select 1km grid cells filtered by municipality bbox

4.description: find grid cells that intersect the 200-year storm-flood polygons

5.description: collapse to one row per grid cell (deduplicate) by grouping on id

6.description: count the number of unique grid cells that intersect storm-flood areas

8.description: limit to the single count row

replan_trigger.error: Step 2 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).

args.sql:
-- Step 2: select 200-year storm-flood polygons clipped to Kristiansand bbox
WITH k AS (
  SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) AS bbox
  FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
  WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'
)
SELECT s.*, s.omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s, k
WHERE ST_Intersects(s.omrade, (SELECT bbox FROM k));

raw_args.sql:
-- Step 2: select 200-year storm-flood polygons clipped to Kristiansand bbox
WITH k AS (
